About This Story

In this powerful story, Lisa faces a big change. She is suddenly alone with three children. She has no job and no savings. Lisa finds strength through the "Parents for Life" package. She goes back to school and builds a new life. This story is about a single mother overcoming obstacles. It shows the importance of education and children as motivation. An inspiring story about a single mother finding strength through her children and building a better life.

Imagine losing everything in one moment. Your home. Your job. Your partner. You're suddenly alone with three young children, no savings, and no idea how you'll survive. That's what happened to Lisa. But in her darkest moment, she found a reason to keep going—and it came from the most unexpected place.

Single parents face unique challenges raising children alone. Many struggle with financial stress, lack of support, and overwhelming responsibilities. This story shows how one mother found strength through her children and built a new life.
